overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a stormy autumn night in the countryside. The character carries a lit torch along a dirt path, passing stone walls, wildflower meadows, and a historic stone archway while rain and lightning illuminate the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: country path with circular stone wall enclosure

events.description: passes seated villager NPC resting on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path holding a torch, passing a seated villager near a stone wall enclosure

notable_agents.action: seated on the grass beside the path, watching the character pass by

entered.detail: low stone wall forming a circular enclosure around a large tree base
massive tree with orange and yellow autumn foliage spreading overhead
narrow dirt trail winding through the grassy countryside
NPC sitting on the grass next to the path wearing simple clothing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night country path where Geralt walks past a seated villager resting beside the trail. A distinctive circular stone wall encloses a large autumn tree to the left, while the dirt path stretches ahead through moderate vegetation.

events.description: passes dense patch of white wildflowers blooming on the left side of the path
path curves gently to the right through the open field

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through open meadows, torchlight illuminating white wildflowers

entered.detail: clusters of small white flowers growing in patches along the path edges
abandoned wooden wagon or cart partially visible in the grass
small building visible on the horizon across the open field

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open meadows where the path winds through patches of white wildflowers. The circular stone wall and seated NPC fall behind as the landscape opens up, revealing distant farm buildings on the horizon under the stormy night sky.

events.description: large stone archway becomes visible ahead marking a boundary
walks through the historic stone archway passing between stone pillars

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through a large stone archway that marks a transition between areas

entered.detail: large historic stone arch with weathered bricks forming a gateway over the path
crumbling stone wall extending from the archway structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a prominent historic stone archway that stands as a gateway in the countryside. Walking through the weathered stone structure, the torchlight illuminates the textured bricks and pillars as the scene transitions from meadow to the open country beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside road with distant farm buildings

events.description: emerges fully into open countryside beyond the archway

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt road through open fields with scattered rocks and distant farm buildings visible

entered.detail: tall slender evergreen trees visible in the distance lining the horizon
scattered rocks and rough ground beside the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the archway, the character continues along the dirt road through expansive open countryside. The landscape features scattered rocky outcrops, distant farm buildings, and cypress trees silhouetted against the stormy night sky as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy country path that transitions from a confined roadside setting into an expansive nocturnal landscape. It begins with Geralt walking past a seated villager and a circular stone wall enclosing a large autumn tree. As the path winds forward, the scene opens into wide meadows filled with patches of white wildflowers, leaving the villager behind and revealing distant farm buildings on the horizon. The camera then follows the character through a weathered historic stone archway, where the torchlight briefly illuminates the textured bricks and pillars. Finally, the view expands into the open countryside beyond the gateway, passing rocky outcrops and cypress trees silhouetted against the dark, stormy sky.
